pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan by NCH Software (real commercial home design application)
pi_items.source: https://www.nchsoftware.com/design/index.html - Official NCH Software website confirms DreamPlan is a real 3D home design software

pi_items.verified_value: Correct extension is .ddp (not .ndp). Projects should be saved as .ddp files
pi_items.source: https://fileinfo.com/extension/ddp and https://www.file-extensions.org/ddp-file-extension-dreamplan-home-design-software-project confirm .ddp is the native DreamPlan file format, not .ndp or .dpn
Verified as standard Windows path and PNG is a standard image format supported for screenshots
Specified in task.json metadata field; reasonable requirement for a conversation seating area

pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan includes outdoor furniture and landscaping objects with categories: Furniture (typical outdoor furniture), Accessories (typical outdoor accessories), Misc (miscellaneous outdoor items). Fire pits would logically be in Accessories or Misc categories.
pi_items.source: https://help.nchsoftware.com/help/en/dreamplan/win/placingobjects.html documents that DreamPlan has exterior object categories for Furniture, Accessories, and Misc items. Object names not specifically listed but categories confirm availability.

pi_items.verified_value: Backyard/Outdoor - matches task description which specifies navigating to the backyard area
pi_items.source: Task.json description specifies 'Navigate to the backyard area (behind the house)'

pi_items.verified_value: Windows 11 specified as base OS; DreamPlan compatible with Windows 11
pi_items.source: env.json base field: 'windows-11'; DreamPlan official website confirms Windows compatibility

pi_items.verified_value: Contemporary House - built-in sample project included with DreamPlan, referenced as 'Sample House' in task
pi_items.source: Task description mentions 'Sample House' project; setup_dreamplan.ps1 references Contemporary House as downloadable sample from DreamPlan
install_dreamplan.ps1 lines 61-62 specify these download URLs; verified as official NCH Software distribution

pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan supports outdoor design with plants, vegetation, landscaping elements, outdoor furniture, and accessories
pi_items.source: https://www.nchsoftware.com/design/index.html and https://help.nchsoftware.com/help/en/dreamplan/win/placingobjects.html confirm DreamPlan has extensive outdoor design tools

pi_items.verified_value: C:\Program Files\NCH Software\DreamPlan\dreamplan.exe or C:\Program Files (x86)\NCH Software\DreamPlan\dreamplan.exe
pi_items.source: install_dreamplan.ps1 and setup_dreamplan.ps1 specify standard NCH Software installation paths verified against multiple search results

privileged_info_summary: DreamPlan is a real commercial home design software by NCH Software that runs on Windows 11. The task requires designing an outdoor conversation area with a fire pit and at least two chairs in the backyard of the 'Sample House' (built-in contemporary house project). CRITICAL ISSUE: The metadata specifies saving the project as FirePitProject.ndp, but DreamPlan's native file format is .ddp, not .ndp. This is a factual error in the task metadata. The task has a 5-minute timeout (300 seconds) and 40-step limit with medium difficulty. The outdoor design must include a fire pit object and outdoor chairs arranged as a grouping, which should be exported to a 3D screenshot. DreamPlan includes outdoor furniture and landscaping object categories (Furniture, Accessories, Misc) for creating the scene. Data is not synthetic—it uses real DreamPlan software and real built-in sample projects.
